sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey PercentageValue AOPCommentDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp VersionKey CreatedBy CreatedDate ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #AOPKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #AOPCommentDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #VersionKey# #CreatedBy# #CreatedDate# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedBy, CreatedDate, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null AOPCommentDesc = #AOPCommentDesc# AOPCommentDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
delete from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedBy, CreatedDate, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey, PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedBy, CreatedDate from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
